images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, standing on a quiet forest pathway. She wears an unbuttoned vintage denim jacket layered over a tight, form-fitting white rib-knit crop top that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, paired with denim shorts. Her silky straight black hair frames a face with flawless skin texture, visible pores, and faint vellus hair, as she looks directly into the camera with intense, seductive eyes, exuding a lazy and sluggish mood. The scene is illuminated by a unique under-lighting setup that keeps the image bright, clear, and professional without heavy shadows, casting a soft glow on her features. The background is a lush, blurred forest bokeh in pastel soft colors, creating a dreamy, high-end atmosphere. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
